approach: Direct & honest. Even weaknesses. No bullshit.

resume.philosophy: Direct and honest to god. The 2026 way.
resume.foundation: Built from everything in this project - career stories, existing resume data, profile, projects, insights report, and the codebase itself as proof of work
next_steps: Research 2026 software engineer resume best practices

cover_letter.format: One honest template. No more per-company personalization.
cover_letter.philosophy: Let Claude speak for me. Use the 'How You Use Claude Code' section from /insights report.
cover_letter.source: docs/report.html - the narrative about how I use Claude Code as a collaborative partner
cover_letter.key_quote: Highly engaged, architecturally opinionated developer who uses Claude Code as a collaborative partner across a full-stack TypeScript/PHP codebase.
next_steps: Extract the relevant insights from the report
Build an honest cover letter template

interview_narrative.arc: My career started okay but went downhill from my own mistakes. But I learned something from each place.

per_company.webcada: I learned to take my work seriously.
per_company.9loop: I learned to separate work and personal life properly.
per_company.imttech: I learned to be better - faster, more reliable.

interview_narrative.identity: I am a damn good engineer. I am honest. I am fun to be around. I am smart. I made mistakes I won't undo because without those mistakes I wasn't even trying.
